steps.title: Find what the student must accomplish
steps.content: The goal requires two things: explaining what a merchant vessel is AND providing examples of merchant vessel types.

steps.title: Identify the choice that fulfills both
steps.content:
Choice C gives the definition and examples in one sentence: a merchant vessel is any ship hired to carry cargo or passengers, and examples include bulk carriers, cruise liners, and oil tankers.
  • A states the definition without examples
  • B provides examples without defining the term
  • D provides neither


That confirms C is correct.
